calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-22-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-08-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Mary Ellen Scherer.
David Zalob, Esq. for Plaintiff: Daniel A. Milligan, ind. and dba A-1 Plumbing Supply Company.
Plaintiff's Witness: Daniel A. Milligan, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Durham Grimes and Doctor Plumber, Inc., as follows:
Damages $34,266.00
Prejudgment Interest $1,388.00
Attorney Fees $2,825.00
Costs $493.50, for a total of $38,972.50
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-02-2007 Continued To Mar-29-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
